ranked_opportunities.verdict: Ocean CDR startup (Halifax, ~40 people, Series A $11.35M Sept 2024) that delivered the world's first verified OAE credits (June 2025) and signed a $31.3M Frontier offtake for 115,000 tonnes 2026-2030. The BD Director role is the commercial program that does not yet exist. Paul built this exact transition twice -- KSAT monitoring from one contract, GFW licensing from Moore Foundation funding -- structurally close enough that the learning curve is short.

Digest skewed toward non-commercial functions. Open Cosmos was previously archived at 57.0; deep dive research upgraded significantly.
